title: centaurea stoebe subsp. australis
intro: Centaurea stoebe subsp. australis, commonly known as the Australian knapweed or brown knapweed, is a perennial plant species in the aster family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Centaurea stoebe subsp. australis include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate pain, and exhibit antioxidant properties. It is often prepared as a tincture or infusion, and its herbal preparations are used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
